response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the song 'Villain'. The provided JSON was abridged; I used on-screen Japanese text and context to provide a complete transcription. Dialogue between Kronii and IRyS follows the song performance. Timestamps are strictly aligned with vocal onset and offset, with logical splitting for pauses and character limits.
